S.FORM: = Paul Kagame = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 10 jiyax 23 ka Paul Kagame ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Rwanda ta sayang o kiya ka Paul Kagame, pnaah hngkawas 2000 idas 4 jiyax 22 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = paul kagamə = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka paul kagamə ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ɾwanda ta sajaŋ o kija ka paul kagamə, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Paul Kagame = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 10 jiyax 23 ka Paul Kagame ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Rwanda ta sayang o kiya ka Paul Kagame, pnaah hngkawas 2000 idas 4 jiyax 22 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = paul kagamə = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka paul kagamə ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ɾwanda ta sajaŋ o kija ka paul kagamə, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
